subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down in truth, and it speaketh before all faces: "Verily, I am the Wronged One, the Stranger. I have stood before..." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل بالحق و ینطق امام الوجوه اننی انا المظلوم الغریب قد کنت قائما امام
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @suffering and imprisonment, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @rejection, opposition and persecution
